diagrams.title: C++ Stream Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Hierarchical tree showing inheritance relationships between all stream classes
diagrams.purpose: Understand class relationships and which classes to use for different I/O operations

diagrams.title: Data Flow Through Streams
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing data movement from source to program and program to destination
diagrams.purpose: Visualize direction of data flow and understand input vs output operations

diagrams.title: File Opening Modes Table
diagrams.description: Table showing all file opening modes and their meanings
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for selecting correct file mode when opening files

diagrams.title: Stream States and Flags
diagrams.description: Visual showing stream state flags and their meanings
elements: eof(), fail(), bad() - check individual flags
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to check and handle stream errors during I/O operations
